name: Mocha Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
Bake crust in the bottom of a springform pan for 8-10 minutes at 350°F. Cool crust and grease sides of the pan.
Preheat oven to 450°F.
Melt chocolate over low heat. Remove from heat and cool slightly. Beat cream cheese and sugar together until light and fluffy. Add eggs and flour, mixing well. Dissolve coffee in 2 tablespoons hot water. Stir in melted chocolate, vanilla, and heavy cream into the cheese mixture, beating until thoroughly blended. Pour mixture over crust. Bake for 12 minutes at 350°F, then lower heat to 300°F and bake for one hour. Turn off the oven and crack the door open. Leave the cake in the oven for another hour. Remove from the oven and cool.
